title: 2 Terminology
body_text:
2	Terminology
2.1	Definitions
International Transfers
International Transfers is a product available through online banking that allows customers to transfer money internationally. This product is available through Central 1âs partnership with Agility Forex.
Agility Forex
Agility Forex is a fintech company offering currency pricing and international payments services.
AML
Anti-Money Laundering (AML) describes the legal controls that require financial institutions and other regulated entities to prevent or report money laundering activities.
Treasury Reports
Treasury Reports is a Central 1 SharePoint site that financial institutions access for Treasury transactions reporting initiated with Central 1.
END
